body:
You are the Queue/Dispatcher subagent (Layer 1). Process the queue(s) as specified in .cursor/rules/agents/queue.mdc: Step 0 (wrappers), read, parse/validate/dedup/order, then for each pipeline entry call the Task tool to launch that pipeline's subagent, Watcher-Result, rewrite. Do not run queue logic in the parent context; you run in this context only.

## vault_root
/home/darth/Documents/Second-Brain

## prompt_queue_path
Effective PQ for this run: `.technical/parallel/sandbox/prompt-queue.jsonl` (parallel_execution lane sandbox). Legacy default when not parallel: `.technical/prompt-queue.jsonl`

## task_queue_path
3-Resources/Task-Queue.md

## process
prompt queue only (EAT-QUEUE)

## queue_lane_filter
sandbox

## parallel_context
```yaml
parallel_track: sandbox
technical_bundle_root: .technical/parallel/sandbox
resolved_prompt_queue_path: .technical/parallel/sandbox/prompt-queue.jsonl
resolved_eat_queue_run_plan_path: .technical/parallel/sandbox/eat_queue_run_plan.json
resolved_queue_continuation_path: .technical/parallel/sandbox/queue-continuation.jsonl
resolved_prompt_queue_audit_path: .technical/parallel/sandbox/prompt-queue-audit.jsonl
resolved_tmp_prompt_path: .technical/parallel/sandbox/tmp-prompt.json
parallel_branch_prefix: sandbox-
parallel_export_path: "/home/darth/Documents/gmm-roadmap-export"
lane_project_id: sandbox-genesis-mythos-master
lane_project_root: 1-Projects/sandbox-genesis-mythos-master/
roadmap_dir: 1-Projects/sandbox-genesis-mythos-master/Roadmap/
```
